name: alphavantage_research
description: All-in-one commodity and economic research tool. Fetches commodity spot prices, historical prices, economic indicators, and market news sentiment in a single call. Use this for any research involving gold, oil, commodities, inflation, interest rates, GDP, or market sentiment. Combine multiple data types in one call to get a comprehensive picture.

spot_symbols.description: Get latest prices for these commodities. Precious metals: GOLD, SILVER. Energy: WTI, BRENT, NATURAL_GAS. Base metals: COPPER, ALUMINUM. Agriculture: WHEAT, CORN, COTTON, SUGAR, COFFEE

historical_symbols.description: Get historical prices for these commodities (requires start_date and end_date)

indicators.description: Economic indicators to fetch. Supported: CPI, INFLATION, FEDERAL_FUNDS_RATE, TREASURY_YIELD, REAL_GDP, UNEMPLOYMENT, RETAIL_SALES, NONFARM_PAYROLL, DURABLE_GOODS

start_date.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (used for historical prices and indicators)

news_topics.description: Fetch market news filtered by topics: energy_transportation, economy_fiscal, economy_monetary, economy_macro, financial_markets, manufacturing, technology, finance

news_limit.description: Number of news articles to return (max 50). Default: 5
